message:
Create the home page for Coherent Design Method - an open-source CLI tool that generates consistent multi-page UI prototypes using Next.js and shadcn/ui. English only.

HERO SECTION:
- Centered, min-h-[80vh]
- Small outline badge at top: 'Open Source CLI Tool'
- Large headline: 'Design once. Stay consistent everywhere.' — apply gradient from white to zinc-400 on 'Stay consistent everywhere.'
- Subheadline: 'Generate interconnected pages with shared components and design systems. Describe what you need — get a complete prototype that stays consistent across every page.'
- Inline terminal command with copy button: npm install -g @coherent/cli
- Outline button: View on GitHub (links to https://github.com/coherent-design/coherent)

THE PROBLEM SECTION:
- Headline: 'AI tools generate pages. Not systems.'
- Two cards side by side:
  Left card 'Without Coherent' with red X icons: Inconsistent headers across pages, Duplicated components everywhere, No shared design tokens, Manual fixes and al drift
  Right card 'With Coherent' with emerald check icons: Shared components by ID — one source of truth, One design system for every page, Global token changes cascade everywhere, Auto-generated documentation stays in sync

HOW IT WORKS SECTION:
- Headline: 'Three commands to a complete prototype'
- 3 steps horizontally with numbered circles:
  Step 1 INITIALIZE: coherent init — Full Next.js project with design system in 30 seconds
  Step 2 DESCRIBE: coherent chat add a dashboard — Natural language to pages that reuse existing components
  Step 3 PREVIEW: coherent preview — Hot reload. Edit in Cursor or CLI. Changes sync instantly.
- Each step shows command in terminal block with green dollar sign and emerald text

KEY FEATURES SECTION:
- Headline: 'Everything you need for consistent design'
- 6 cards in 3x2 grid, each with icon in emerald bg-primary/10 container:
  1. System-level consistency — One change updates all pages. No drift, no manual sync.
  2. Shared components CID-001 — Edit hupdates everywhere. Every block has a unique ID.
  3. Design System viewer — Auto-generated component docs. Tokens, variants, usage — always current.
  4. 12 page templates — Dashboard, settings, blog, gallery, FAQ, changelog and more.
  5. Figma import — Import your designs. Tokens become CSS variables. Components become shared blocks.
  6. Export and deploy — One command to clean production-ready Next.js. Zero platform lock-in.

WHAT YOU CAN BUILD SECTION:
- Headline: 'What you can build'
- 4 cards in 2x2 grid, each with title, terminal command block with copy button, and description:
  SaaS Dashboard: coherent chat dashboard with stats and charts — Complete admin interface
  Settings Panel: coherent chat settings with tabs and forms — Organized settings with validation
  Blog Platform: coherent chat blog with posts and comments — Content management system
  Portfolio Site: coherent chat portfolio with project gallery — Professional showcase

FIGMA IMPORT SECTION:
- Headline: 'Already hatext: 'Import from Figma and get a coherent prototype with shared tokens and components.'
- Terminal block with copy button: coherent import figma URL --token TOKEN
- Three items with arrow icons: Tokens to CSS variables, Components to shared blocks, Frames to pages

GETTING STARTED SECTION:
- Headline: 'Getting started'
- One terminal window block with copy button containing 4 commands:
  npm install -g @coherent/cli
  coherent init
  coherent chat add a dashboard
  coherent preview
- Below: 'That is it. Start building.'

FOOTER:
- Left: Coherent Design Method · by Sergei Kovtun
- Right: LinkedIn link (https://www.linkedin.com/in/sergeikovtun/) and GitHub link with icons

DESIGN: All terminal blocks bg-zinc-950 rounded-xl with emerald-400 text and green dollar prompt. Cards rounded-xl border-border/15 bg-card hover:border-border/30. Feature icons in bg-primary/10 rounded-lg container. Sections separated by border-t border-border/10 with py-20 spacing. Copy buttons always visible on terminal blocks. Use clent directive for useState copy functionality.
